results.justification: EXACT TWIN — augments pretrained vocab with domain-specific tokens guaranteeing efficiency never decreases; up to 20% sequence shorten. Same post-hoc fixed-pair augmentation as BIND-RUNE.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Teaching Old Tokenizers New Words adaptation
results.justification: Efficient tokenizer adaptation for pre-trained models; same post-hoc augmentation paradigm.
Post-hoc additions COALESCE multi-token characters into single tokens — exact bind-rune fusion mechanism.
AdaptiVocab replaces tokens with domain-specific n-gram tokens for BPE pretrained models.
Merge-list-free inference shows vocabulary-only inference path; same scope of operations.
Post-hoc intervention masks token IDs WITHOUT modifying tokenizer/embedding/model — non-invasive.
